title: chenopodium simplex
intro: Chenopodium simplex, also known as sandwort, is a perennial plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of Chenopodium simplex include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Chenopodium simplex can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by using the plant in a salve or ointment to apply topically.
